hypothesis: Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger channel breakout and Volume Oscillator confirmation creates a robust trend entry signal that filters out weak breakouts. The addition of a Fibonacci level filter adds further robustness by ensuring the breakout occurs at significant support/resistance levels, reducing false signals and improving risk-reward profiles.

Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger channel breakout and volume oscillator confirms strong momentum trends while filtering out weak or false breakouts. The ATR-based risk management ensures dynamic stop-loss and take-profit levels that adapt to volatility, improving risk-reward ratios.
